_meta.schema: tier-less catalog (existing) PLUS additive tiers block per item + top-level zones + fixed_costs

items.label: Architectural Layout
items.description:
2D Architectural Design
Modern 3D Elevation
Structural Design
MEP Drawings
All construction work to be carried out as per approved plan
No. of 2D floor plan iteration is not a constrain. The number of changes will be done till the floor plan is finalized.

items.label: Structural Design & Seismic Compliance
items.description: Structure shall be designed as per IS 456, IS 1893, and IS 13920 for seismic Zone IV, with ductile detailing for safety.

items.label: Steel
items.description:
Rathi Steel Fe500/Fe550
We have taken 4.5Kg per sqft average
Any variation from 4.5kg will not be charged additionally, Giving the strength for S+4 floors.

basic.spec:
4.5Kg per sqft
Any variation above and below 4.5kg is charged and
refunded on pro rata basis.

mid_luxury.spec:
4.5Kg per sqft
Any variation above and below 4.5kg is charged and
refunded on pro rata basis.

luxury.spec:
4.5Kg per sq ft
Any variation above and below 4.5kg is charged and
refunded on pro rata basis.

items.label: Cement
items.description:
Shree/Dalmia/Ambuja
Same brand shall be used for all RCC, brickwork, and plastering works. Fluctuation of pricing is taken care of, this will not be passed on to the client.

items.label: Bricks
items.description:
Baghpat (U.P) A Class Red Brick
External walls shall be constructed using 9-inch (4.5 inch in case of common wall) thick brickwork and internal partition walls shall be 4.5-inch thick

items.label: Concrete
items.description:
M25
RCC work in Slab, Beam, Column, and Foundation to be carried but achieving M25 strength.

basic.spec:
RCC work in Slab, Beam, Column, and Foundation to
be carried out.
M25 ratio is 1:1:2 (Cement : Sand : Coarse
Aggregates).
Proper use of Vibrators and Cover Blocks in Slabs,
beams, columns and foundation.

mid_luxury.spec:
RCC work in Slab, Beam, Column, and Foundation to
be carried out.
M25 ratio is 1:1:2 (Cement : Sand : Coarse
Aggregates).

beams, columns and foundation.

be carried out.

Aggregates).
Proper use of Vibrators and Cover Blocks in Slabs,
beams, columns and foundation.

items.description:

Floor to Ceiling Height (Clear Height) is 10 ft on first and second floors.
Stilt height as per the government norms

items.label: Plaster Work
items.description:
Interior Plaster : 8-10mm thick with ratio of 1:2:3 (Cement:Coarse Sand:Fine Sand)
Single coat plaster of 8-10mm thick would be provided.
Exterior Plaster : 12-15mm thick with ratio of 1:2:2 (Cement:Coarse sand:Fine Sand)
Double coat plaster totalling to 12-15 mm would be provided for durability and strength

basic.spec:
Interior Plaster : 8-10mm thick with ratio of 1:2:3
(Cement:Coarse Sand:Fine Sand). Single coat plaster
of 8-10mm thick would be provided.
Exterior Plaster : 12-15mm thick with ratio of 1:2:2
(Cement:Coarse sand:Fine Sand). Double coat
plaster totaling to 12-15 mm would be provided for
durability and strength

mid_luxury.spec:
Interior Plaster : 8-10mm thick with ratio of 1:2:3

Exterior Plaster : 12-15mm thick with ratio of 1:2:2
(Cement:Coarse sand:Fine Sand). Double coat
plaster totaling to 12-15 mm would be provided for

items.label: Curing
items.description:
Sika Antisol
All RCC and masonry works shall be properly cured using continuous water curing methods to maintain adequate moisture for hydration of cement.
Minimum 12-14 days for RCC work, minimum 10-14 days for brickwork and plaster twice a day
Columns will be covered with jute bag during curing to retain water

basic.spec:
All RCC and masonry works shall be properly cured
using continuous water curing methods to maintain
adequate moisture for hydration of cement.
Minimum 12-14 days for RCC work, minimum 10-14
days for brickwork and plaster twice a day

mid_luxury.spec:
All RCC and masonry works shall be properly cured
using continuous water curing methods to maintain
adequate moisture for hydration of cement.
Minimum 12-14 days for RCC work, minimum 10-14
days for brickwork and plaster twice a day

luxury.spec:
All RCC and masonry works shall be properly cured
using continuous water curing methods to maintain
adequate moisture for hydration of cement.
Minimum 12-14 days for RCC work, minimum 10-14
days for brickwork and plaster twice a day

items.label: Waterproofing
items.description:
Sika/Dr. Fixit LW+ (pidilite)
Concrete used anywhere is infused with waterproofing crystalline compound
Waterproofing coat is done in wet areas like balcony, bathrooms, underground sump
Gola is created on terrace on joint of slab and parapat wall
Waterproofing compound is is added to third-party plaster

basic.spec:
Concrete used anywhere is infused with
waterproofing crystalline compound
Waterproofing coat is done in wet areas like balcony,
bathrooms, underground sump
Gola is created on terrace on joint of slab and parapet
wall.
Waterproofing compound is added to external plaster.

mid_luxury.spec:
Concrete used anywhere is infused with
waterproofing crystalline compound
Waterproofing coat is done in wet areas like balcony,
bathrooms, underground sump
Gola is created on terrace on joint of slab and parapet
wall.

items.label: Anti-Termite Treatment
items.description:
Bayer / Terminator (pidilite)
Termite soil treatment begins pre-construction for complete building.
To be done at plinth level with Bayer & Terminator (Pidilite) anti-termite chemical.

basic.spec:
Double Layer Protection System (DLPS)
FIRST STEP : Termite soil treatment begins
preconstruction for complete building. To be done at
plinth level with Bayer & Terminator (Pidilite)
antitermite chemical.
SECOND STEP : Systematic piping network for
uniform distribution across the area. Designed for
efficiency, durability, and leak-proof performance.
TEAM AT ZUILD USES DLPS, SO AS TO ENSURE
MAXIMUM PROTECTION TOWARDS TERMITE.

mid_luxury.spec:
Double Layer Protection System (DLPS)
FIRST STEP : Termite soil treatment begins
preconstruction for complete building. To be done at
plinth level with Bayer & Terminator (Pidilite)
antitermite chemical.
SECOND STEP : Systematic piping network for
uniform distribution across the area. Designed for
efficiency, durability, and leak-proof performance.
TEAM AT ZUILD USES DLPS, SO AS TO ENSURE
MAXIMUM PROTECTION TOWARDS TERMITE.

luxury.spec:
Double Layer Protection System (DLPS)
FIRST STEP : Termite soil treatment begins
preconstruction for complete building. To be done at
plinth level with Bayer & Terminator (Pidilite)
antitermite chemical.
SECOND STEP : Systematic piping network for
uniform distribution across the area. Designed for
efficiency, durability, and leak-proof performance.
TEAM AT ZUILD USES DLPS, SO AS TO ENSURE
MAXIMUM PROTECTION TOWARDS TERMITE.

Chicken mesh to be used in all joints of brickwork and columns and conduct areas to prevent crack

items.label: Assumptions
items.description:
Site level should not be less than 1 ft below the road level
Foundation is considered combination of isolated and combined footing 5 ft-6ft below the natural ground level

items.label: Main Entry Door
items.description: 32/44 mm thick premium flush door shutter with polished/laminated finish, fixed on a seasoned hardwood frame (marandi/sal wood), complete with SS 304 hinges, SS tower bolts, door stopper, handle, and all necessary fittings and hardware.

items.label: Modular/ WalkIn Wardrobe
items.description:
Laminated finished modular / walk-in wardrobe constructed using Ply board for carcass and shutters. All panels shall be edge-banded with PVC edge band for durability and moisture resistance.
External finish shall be in laminate finish only. Internal surfaces shall be finished in laminate / pre-laminated boards.
Hardware shall include soft-close hinges and telescopic drawer channels from reputed brands such as Godrej/Ozone or equivalent. Handles shall be standard SS / aluminium.
The wardrobe shall include basic internal layout comprising shelves, hanging rods, and 2 drawer units, designed for functional storage.
Lofts, fluted glass, acrylic/PU finish, premium accessories, and specialized fittings shall not be part of this scope.

basic.spec:
Laminated finished wardrobe / walk-in wardrobe
constructed using Ply board for carcass and shutters.
All panels shall be edge-banded with PVC edge band
for durability and moisture resistance.
External finish shall be in laminate finish only. Internal
surfaces shall be finished in laminate / pre-laminated
boards. Hardware shall include soft-close hinges and
telescopic drawer channels from reputed brands
such as Godrej/Ozone or equivalent. Handles shall be
standard SS / aluminium.
The wardrobe shall include basic internal layout
comprising shelves, hanging rods, and 2 drawer
units, designed for functional storage.
Lofts, fluted glass, acrylic/PU finish, premium
accessories, and specialized fittings shall not be part
of this scope.

mid_luxury.spec:
Laminated finished modular / walk-in wardrobe
constructed using Ply board for carcass and shutters.
All panels shall be edge-banded with PVC edge band
for durability and moisture resistance.
External finish shall be in laminate finish only. Internal
surfaces shall be finished in laminate / pre-laminated
boards. Hardware shall include soft-close hinges and
telescopic drawer channels from reputed brands
such as Godrej/Ozone or equivalent. Handles shall be
standard SS / aluminium.
The wardrobe shall include basic internal layout
comprising shelves, hanging rods, and 2 drawer
units, designed for functional storage.
Lofts, fluted glass, acrylic/PU finish, premium
accessories, and specialized fittings shall not be part
of this scope.

luxury.spec:
Fluted glass, acrylic/PU finished modular / walk-in
wardrobe constructed using HDHMR for carcass and
shutters. All panels shall be edge-banded with PVC
edge band for durability and moisture resistance.
Hardware shall include soft-close hinges and
telescopic drawer channels from reputed brands
such as Hettich/Haffle or equivalent with premium
profile handles.
The wardrobe shall include basic internal layout
comprising shelves, hanging rods, and 2 drawer
units, designed for functional storage.

items.label: Raft Foundation
items.description: RCC raft foundation shall be constructed as per structural design using M25 grade concrete with proper reinforcement, vibration, and compaction. Concrete shall be mixed with integral crystalline waterproofing compound.

items.label: Retaining Walls
items.description: RCC retaining walls of 6 inch thickness shall be constructed to resist lateral earth pressure. After 6 inch of RCC wall 4.5 inch of brick work to be provided. Proper shuttering, vibration, and curing shall be ensured.

items.label: Waterproofing System
items.description: Three-layer waterproofing system shall be provided: Integral crystalline waterproofing compound in concrete; PVC water bars at all construction and expansion joints; Plaster with waterproofing compound mixed.

items.label: Sump Pit & Dewatering System
items.description: RCC sump pit shall be constructed at lowest level. Dual pump system (1 working + 1 standby) with automatic float switch shall be installed for water discharge.

items.label: Height
items.description: Clear height (Floor to ceiling) of 11 ft to be provided.
